CustomField.formula:
CASE(Loan_Type__c, "Affirm Financial MasterCard", CASE(PcoD_Bankruptcy_State__c, "BKCP Not Discharged", HYPERLINK("https://c.na55.content.force.com/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015j00000026ZPn","Script 2"), HYPERLINK("https://c.na55.content.force.com/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015j00000026ZPi","Script 1")),
"Affirm Financial Term Loan", CASE(Loan_Process_Type__c, "Traditional", CASE(Permanent_Address_Province__c, "MB", HYPERLINK("https://c.na55.content.force.com/apex/ShowLoanTeleScript?applName=" & Name,"Manitoba specific Loan Telescript"), HYPERLINK("https://c.na55.content.force.com/apex/ShowLoanTeleScript?applName=" & Name ,"Generic Loan Telescript")), CASE(PcoD_Bankruptcy_State__c, "BKCP Not Discharged", HYPERLINK("https://c.na55.content.force.com/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015j00000026ZPs","Script 3"), "NA")), "NA")
CustomField.label: Script
